THE TALE OF SNAZZY

What was once hidden…
is now poured.

After college, living in his grandmother's San Francisco basement, our founder David found something strange — a false wall, a sealed prohibition-era vault, and behind it, a forgotten world.

THE DISCOVERY

Inside, he found
one word: Snazzy.

Inside, he found shelves of whiskey, brandy, and champagne. And at the center, under a dusty beam of sunlight, sat a single, yellowing sheet of paper. No bottle, no box, just the paper.

David unfolded it slowly and carefully. Most of the ink had faded, but one word remained, bold and clear, at the top.

"One Snazzy, please."
THE LORE OF SNAZZY

In the glittering
1920s, Snazzy was
whispered about.

Behind closed doors, it was the cocktail everyone wanted but no one could quite pin down. The aroma was herbal and citrusy, with a sharp, mysterious quality that shifted depending on who was pouring it.

It was rumored to have been bootlegged East, but first poured during the gold rush, it made its mark in San Francisco. People toasted to it on the night of the Repeal.

And then, just like that, it vanished — gone and forgotten. Until David cracked open that safe and breathed life back into a legend.

A FORGOTTEN ATTITUDE

In the 1920s,
Snazzy wasn't
on menus —
it was known.

A cocktail whispered between the bold.
Citrus, herbal, complex — and unapologetically full-bodied.
Glamour without restraint. Indulgence without apology.
And then… it disappeared. Not just the recipe. The attitude.
WHAT WE BELIEVE

Somewhere along the way,
drinking got dull.

Watered down. Overly safe. Forgettable. We believe the opposite.

01

Life should feel a little more electric.

02

Flavor should be felt, not forgotten.

03

Every moment deserves a touch of Dazzling Decadence.

WHY SNAZZY HITS DIFFERENT

We didn't just
revive a name.
We rebuilt the
experience.

01
Full-bodied, complex flavor.

Citrus-led, layered, unapologetic.

02
Less, but more.

Fewer, better ingredients that actually show up.

03
10% ABV.

Because a cocktail should feel like one.

SNAZZY IS FOR
The pregame that turns into the night.
The rooftop that becomes the memory.
The "one drink" that becomes the story.
BACK WITH DAZZLING DECADENCE

Hidden for a century.
Back with dazzling
decadence.

Snazzy exists to spark the ordinary into an occasion. To bring back glamour. Flavor. Feeling. To make every sip feel like something just started.

Not for everyone.
Just for those who expect more.
Snazzy
sna·zy   / ˈsna-zé /
ADJECTIVE, verb, noun, a lifestyle.
:Modern and stylish in a way that attracts attention.
:Effortlessly elevated — where style, taste, and energy meet.
:A bold expression of confidence; polished without trying too hard.
:Premium, but never pretentious — refined with an edge.
:A feeling as much as a look: smooth, vibrant, and undeniably cool.
:The intersection of flavor, mood, and moment.
IN A SENTENCE
"Wow, this drink is Snazzy!"
